metadata.title: Flint - Discord bot hosting (from €2/month per bot)
metadata.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform to host and manage your Discord bots with automatic commands, components v2, multi-language support, and dynamic variables.

hero.title: Flint - Host your Discord bots (from €2/month per bot)
hero.description: Host and manage your bots with automatic commands (prefix and slash), components v2, automatic help, multi-language support, and dynamic variables.

card.title: Live fleet overview
card.subtitle: Monitor every bot instance from a single operational dashboard.
card.preview: Real-time preview of your bots' status

features.title: Key features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run your bots in production.

autoCommands.title: Automatic commands
autoCommands.description: Prefix and slash commands are automatically generated and synchronized for each bot.

componentsV2.title: Components v2
componentsV2.description: Full support for components v2 and reliable rich interactions.

autoHelp.title: Automatic help
autoHelp.description: Automatically generated command help and documentation.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.description: Translate messages and command labels and easily enable multiple languages.

dynamicVariables.title: Dynamic variables
dynamicVariables.description: Dynamic templates with variables like bot_latency, guild_count, and more.

hosting.title: Hosting & scalability
hosting.description: Simple plans at €2/month per bot with built-in monitoring and scalability.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to take control of your bots.

addBot.title: Add a bot
addBot.description: Connect your Discord application via OAuth and register it in Flint.

dashboard.title: Manage from the dashboard
dashboard.description: Access commands, logs, and settings from a centralized interface.

realtime.title: Control in real time
realtime.description: Start, stop, and scale your bots instantly based on demand.

footer.tagline: Discord bot hosting - plans from €2/month per bot

login.title: Connect your Discord account
login.description: Authenticate via OAuth2 to access your workspace and host your bots.

dashboard.loginDescription: Your dashboard is protected. Log in with Discord to manage your bots.

addBot.title: Add a bot
addBot.description: The token is verified via the API then encrypted before storage.
